text_block_list.text:
It's been several days since the spring Tenno Sho,
and now we're now readying for the upcoming
Japan Cup.

Mihono Bourbon has collected any and all data
regarding Tokai Teio, including materials she's
already analyzed before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Initiating input.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's pulling ahead with those graceful strides of
hers and—there she goes, right past the finish
line! What a great run from Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
What an effortless victory... She was a full three
lengths ahead of the runner-up. And she looks
quite at ease both physically and mentally.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: So this is what talent looks like...

Tokai Teio is known as the Monarch and was the
Twin Crown champion two years ago.

She climbed to the top of the Twinkle Series with
a combination of natural talent and tireless
effort.

After sustaining an injury at the Japanese Derby,
all her hard work and achievements came
unraveled.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Initiating data playback. Inputting data for
"Tokai Teio."

Though Mihono Bourbon is eager when she starts
watching the recordings, her expression gradually
darkens.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's time again for this year's Kikuka Sho! This race
is looking to be an exciting one!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Regrettably, Tokai Teio, who everyone was
expecting to become the Triple Crown champion,
has to sit this one out due to an injury.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
It's really too bad. I was looking forward to seeing
Tokai Teio run.

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio, who missed out on an undefeated
Triple Crown run, is currently training her hardest
in preparation for her comeback.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's too bad about the Kikuka Sho, but I'm not out
of the game yet!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You haven't seen anything yet!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Just as Tokai Teio recovered from the fracture
she sustained last year and rejoined the Twinkle
Series...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: She seems to have suffered another injury.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: No way! Teio's hurt again?! Is she gonna be okay?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
There are other up-and-comers showing up every
day... I feel like her days in the spotlight are
coming to an end.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Not yet... I'm not done yet! I'm just getting
started!

After this, Tokai Teio successfully returns to
racing again.

She declares she's aiming for the Japan Cup, and
the video ends.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is not the first time I have watched footage
of her two victories in the Classic Triple Crown
tour...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But I can understand her "happiness" now more
than ever.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
And... I can understand her "frustration" just as
much.
Mihono Bourbon clenches her fists tightly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Do you think she's "okay" now?

Worrying about it won't change anything, though,
and we need to focus on our own path to victory.

When I tell Mihono Bourbon this, she nods, but
her expression remains troubled.

We head to the track to get some fresh air and
reset, but we're not the only ones there.
Tokai Teio is there training too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Teio...

She's running at full tilt, as if her laps are being
timed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I won't lose, I won't lose, I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win the Japan Cup!

She sprints past the finish line with a mighty
shout.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... All right, a new record!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Status—"shock."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was incapable of looking away from Teio as she
ran. Considering this, and the emotions that
surfaced as I watched, I conclude...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analysis complete. Verdicts are consistent. Teio
has given me "courage."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In general terms, "courage" is defined by the act
of dauntlessly moving forward in the face of fear
and doubt.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have inputted this information into my database
as it pertains to becoming "a runner who inspires
courage in others."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Teio has this "courage."

Mihono Bourbon's gaze remains fixed upon Tokai
Teio as she continues racing around the track.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Courage is warm and full of power.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I now know what it means to be inspired with
courage. Therefore...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I understand how much power someone must
possess to inspire others.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have determined that I must strengthen my body
further. Let us move on to training.

We take our training today more seriously than
ever before.

After training, I realize I forgot something at the
track and head back for it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup!

Her endurance is admirable, but it's almost
curfew.

I'm about to suggest that she wrap things up, but
another voice rings out before I can say anything.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Burning the midnight oil, Tokai Teio?

It's Symboli Rudolf, a strict Umamusume who
serves as Tracen Academy's student council
president.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Prez! Hehe. I don't wanna lose the Japan
Cup, so I've gotta train hard.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Bourbon said she's entering too!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Really now? She's been compared to you quite
often ever since she started her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I know. That's why I'm keeping an eye on her! I
saw her run at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She's been living rent free in my head ever since. I
was shocked and frustrated...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But also super excited at the same time! The
Japan Cup will be a fun race for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta come and watch me run my hardest,
Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Of course. Since you insist.

Symboli Rudolf smiles warmly at Tokai Teio as she
babbles excitedly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'll be cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Ehehe!
choice_data_list:
(Teio's worried about having Bourbon as her
competition?)

text_block_list.text:
I had no idea this was the case, and I bet Mihono
Bourbon doesn't either.

From the looks of Tokai Teio's training, she's
going to be giving it her all in the Japan Cup.

Hearing Tokai Teio's impassioned speech gives
me a sense of renewed vigor.
